about.heading: About
about.description1: The World Budo Karate League (WBKL) is an international Kyokushin Karate organization composed of dojos in 5 countries. Founded with the purpose of preserving and promoting the true spirit of Budo.
about.description2: Our mission is to keep alive the values of Kyokushin: respect, discipline, perseverance, and indomitable spirit. Through championships, seminars, and certification programs, we seek to elevate the standard of Karate worldwide.
about.values.communityDesc: United by the budo spirit around the world
about.values.excellenceDesc: World-class standards in teaching and competition
about.values.traditionDesc: Respecting the Kyokushin legacy and its core values
events.heading: Events
events.description: Discover upcoming championships, clinics, and seminars from WBKL around the world.
news.heading: News
dojos.heading: Find a Dojo
dojos.description: The WBKL has a worldwide network of certified dojos that offer the highest quality Kyokushin Karate instruction. Find the dojo closest to you and begin your path in Budo.
registration.successMessage: We have received your registration for {event}. We will contact you soon with more details.
page.home.title: World Budo Karate League
page.about.title: About WBKL - World Budo Karate League
page.about.metaDescription: Learn about the history, mission and values of the World Budo Karate League. Our organization is dedicated to promoting Kyokushin Karate worldwide.
aboutPage.heading: About
aboutPage.subheading: Learn about our history, mission and values
aboutPage.orgDescription1: Our Kyokushin Karate organization WBKL is dedicated to the comprehensive training of martial artists worldwide, keeping alive the values of Budo and the spirit of improvement that characterizes Kyokushin.
aboutPage.orgDescription2: The World Budo Karate League supports affiliated dojos and federations, providing quality standards, international certifications, and a framework for fair competition and personal growth.
aboutPage.valuesIntro: Principles that WBKL adopts and promotes worldwide
aboutPage.timelineIntro: A journey through the most important milestones of our history
aboutPage.leadershipIntro: The team guiding WBKL into the future
aboutPage.values.truthDesc: Truth as the foundation of personal growth.
aboutPage.values.indomitableDesc: Perseverance in the face of challenges.
aboutPage.values.excellenceDesc: Aspire to the highest in technique and character.
aboutPage.timeline.1970.title: Founding of Kyokushin
aboutPage.timeline.1970.desc: Sosai Masutatsu Oyama founds the International Karate Organization Kyokushin, establishing the foundations of full-contact style.
aboutPage.timeline.1995.title: Global Expansion
aboutPage.timeline.1995.desc: Kyokushin expands to more than 100 countries, becoming one of the most practiced karate styles in the world.
aboutPage.timeline.2015.title: Creation of WBKL
aboutPage.timeline.2015.desc: The World Budo Karate League is founded to unify and promote Kyokushin values worldwide, preserving its authentic spirit.
aboutPage.timeline.2020.title: International Certification
aboutPage.timeline.2020.desc: WBKL launches its international certification program for instructors, establishing world-class quality standards.
aboutPage.timeline.2025.title: World Championship
aboutPage.timeline.2025.desc: WBKL organizes its first Kyokushin World Championship, attended by warriors from various countries.
page.branches.title: Dojos
page.branches.metaDescription: Find a Karate Kyokushin dojo near you. WBKL affiliated dojos around the world.
branchesPage.subheading: Discover WBKL affiliated dojos around the world
branchesPage.description1: The WBKL has a worldwide network of certified dojos that offer the highest quality Kyokushin Karate instruction.
branchesPage.description2: We are currently present in 5 countries, with certified dojos that guarantee the most authentic Kyokushin teaching.
branchesPage.ourDojosDescription: The WBKL has a worldwide network of affiliated dojos committed to excellence in Kyokushin Karate instruction.
branchesPage.selectCountryDesc: Find WBKL affiliated dojos in each country.
branchesPage.dojosInDesc: WBKL affiliated dojos in this country.
page.programs.title: Programs
page.programs.metaDescription: Discover our training programs in martial arts. Kyokushin Karate, combat and more.
programsPage.subheading: We offer a variety of martial arts programs for all levels and experiences.
programsPage.kyokushinDesc: The most practiced full-contact style in the world. Develop strength, discipline and technique through traditional Japanese training.
programsPage.combatDesc: Complementary programs to improve your combat technique and physical preparation.
programsPage.readyDesc: Join our community and start your martial arts journey with the best instructors.

footer.aboutText: Strengthening body, mind and spirit through the path of Kyokushin. United by the budo spirit in 5 countries.
